pi_items.verified_value: PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Database (eegmmidb 1.0.0), Subject S001, Run 01 (Eyes Open Baseline)
pi_items.source: install_openbci.sh lines 133-169 show data comes from PhysioNet; file headers confirm: '%Source = PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Dataset (eegmmidb 1.0.0); %Subject = S001'; S001R01.edf exists at https://physionet.org/files/eegmmidb/1.0.0/S001/S001R01.edf (HTTP 200, 1.2 MB, verified accessible)
File header confirms: '%Sample Rate = 250 Hz'; install_openbci.sh line 208 shows PhysioNet data (160 Hz) is resampled to 250 Hz

pi_items.verified_value: 8 channels: Fp1, Fp2, C3, C4, P7, P8, O1, O2
pi_items.source: File header confirms: '%Number of channels = 8'; '%Channel Order = Fp1, Fp2, C3, C4, P7, P8, O1, O2'; install_openbci.sh converts from 64-channel PhysioNet data to 8-channel OpenBCI format
File contains 15,258 total lines: 8 header lines + 1 column header + 15,249 data samples; 15,249 samples / 250 Hz = ~61 seconds of EEG data

privileged_info_summary: The task 'stream_playback_udp_custom_port@1' loads real EEG data from the PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Database (EEGMMIDB 1.0.0), specifically Subject S001, Run 01 (eyes open baseline). The file 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-EyesOpen.txt' contains 61 seconds of 8-channel EEG data (Fp1, Fp2, C3, C4, P7, P8, O1, O2) sampled at 250 Hz, converted from the original 64-channel PhysioNet data (160 Hz). The task configures OpenBCI GUI v5.2.2 to play back this recording and stream it via UDP protocol on port 12345. All metadata port (12345), protocol (UDP), and file name/path values are correct and verified against actual data files and installation scripts.
